message:
fix: per-model reasoning flags, deterministic find_by_id, pin asupersync, hide-CWD option

- Per-model reasoning detection (#19): model_is_reasoning() returns
  Option<bool> based on known model families (o1/o3/o4 = reasoning,
  gpt-4o = not, claude-3-haiku = not, etc.), falling back to provider
  default only for unknown models. Replaces blanket provider-level flag.

- Deterministic find_by_id ordering (#17): stable sort after model
  construction gives canonical providers priority (anthropic for Claude,
  openai for GPT, google for Gemini, cohere for Command). Within same
  priority, alphabetical by provider+id.

- Pin asupersync =0.2.5 (#20): exact version pin in both [dependencies]
  and [dev-dependencies] prevents semver-incompatible updates from
  breaking cargo install.

- Hide CWD from system prompt (PR #21 idea): --hide-cwd-in-prompt flag
  and PI_HIDE_CWD_IN_PROMPT env var. Useful for security-sensitive
  environments where directory paths leak information.

Closes #17, closes #19, closes #20

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1576,7 +1576,7 @@ where
     Some(ModelEntry {
         model: Model {
             id: normalized_model_id.clone(),
-            name: normalized_model_id.clone(),
+            name: normalized_model_id,
             api: defaults.api.to_string(),
             provider: provider.to_string(),
             base_url: defaults.base_url.to_string(),
